prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:

```pddl
(record_change_request technical_owner_site_a)
(assign_assessor_to_request technical_owner_site_a assessor_candidate_1)
(engage_sme_for_request technical_owner_site_a sme_engineering_1)
(finalize_sme_engagement_for_request technical_owner_site_a sme_engineering_1)
(identify_technical_impact_area technical_owner_site_a technical_area_piping_modification sme_engineering_1)
(assign_functional_reviewer_to_request technical_owner_site_a functional_reviewer_quality_lead)
(record_technical_owner_review technical_owner_site_a technical_area_piping_modification functional_reviewer_quality_lead)
(release_functional_reviewer_from_request technical_owner_site_a functional_reviewer_quality_lead)
(record_change_request process_owner_site_a)

(engage_sme_for_request process_owner_site_a sme_engineering_1)
(finalize_sme_engagement_for_request process_owner_site_a sme_engineering_1)
(identify_quality_impact_area process_owner_site_a quality_area_validation sme_engineering_1)
(assign_functional_reviewer_to_request process_owner_site_a functional_reviewer_quality_lead)
(record_process_owner_review process_owner_site_a quality_area_validation functional_reviewer_quality_lead)
(assemble_change_dossier technical_owner_site_a process_owner_site_a technical_area_piping_modification quality_area_validation change_dossier_package_1)

(engage_sme_for_request technical_owner_site_a sme_engineering_1)
(mark_change_dossier_evidence_reviewed change_dossier_package_1 technical_owner_site_a sme_engineering_1)
(close_technical_owner_conditions technical_owner_site_a change_dossier_package_1)
(close_process_owner_conditions process_owner_site_a change_dossier_package_1)
(record_change_request impact_assessment_equipment_change)
(assign_assessor_to_request impact_assessment_equipment_change assessor_candidate_3)
(release_sme_from_request technical_owner_site_a sme_engineering_1)
(engage_sme_for_request impact_assessment_equipment_change sme_engineering_1)
(finalize_sme_engagement_for_request impact_assessment_equipment_change sme_engineering_1)
(release_functional_reviewer_from_request process_owner_site_a functional_reviewer_quality_lead)
(assign_validation_protocol_to_assessment impact_assessment_equipment_change validation_protocol_pqi)
(assign_technical_assessment_to_assessment impact_assessment_equipment_change technical_assessment_report_1)
(assign_functional_reviewer_to_request impact_assessment_equipment_change functional_reviewer_quality_lead)
(finalize_evidence_and_attach_to_dossier impact_assessment_equipment_change evidence_test_report_1 change_dossier_package_1)
(activate_assessment_for_validation impact_assessment_equipment_change evidence_test_report_1 change_dossier_package_1 sme_engineering_1)
(claim_validation_protocol_for_assessment impact_assessment_equipment_change validation_protocol_pqi functional_reviewer_quality_lead evidence_test_report_1 change_dossier_package_1)
(start_technical_assessment_review impact_assessment_equipment_change technical_assessment_report_1 evidence_test_report_1 change_dossier_package_1)
(record_assessment_final_signoff impact_assessment_equipment_change)
(publish_change_decision impact_assessment_equipment_change external_reference_guidance_doc sme_engineering_1)
(propagate_assessor_assignment_to_assessment impact_assessment_equipment_change assessor_candidate_3 external_reference_guidance_doc)
(record_change_request impact_assessment_production_change)
(assign_assessor_to_request impact_assessment_production_change assessor_candidate_3)
(release_sme_from_request impact_assessment_equipment_change sme_engineering_1)
(engage_sme_for_request impact_assessment_production_change sme_engineering_1)
(finalize_sme_engagement_for_request impact_assessment_production_change sme_engineering_1)
(release_functional_reviewer_from_request impact_assessment_equipment_change functional_reviewer_quality_lead)
(unassign_validation_protocol_from_assessment impact_assessment_equipment_change validation_protocol_pqi)
(unassign_technical_assessment_from_assessment impact_assessment_equipment_change technical_assessment_report_1)
(assign_functional_reviewer_to_request impact_assessment_production_change functional_reviewer_quality_lead)
(assign_validation_protocol_to_assessment impact_assessment_production_change validation_protocol_pqi)
(assign_technical_assessment_to_assessment impact_assessment_production_change technical_assessment_report_1)
(finalize_evidence_and_attach_to_dossier impact_assessment_production_change evidence_test_report_2 change_dossier_package_1)
(activate_assessment_for_validation impact_assessment_production_change evidence_test_report_2 change_dossier_package_1 sme_engineering_1)
(claim_validation_protocol_for_assessment impact_assessment_production_change validation_protocol_pqi functional_reviewer_quality_lead evidence_test_report_2 change_dossier_package_1)
(start_technical_assessment_review impact_assessment_production_change technical_assessment_report_1 evidence_test_report_2 change_dossier_package_1)
(record_assessment_final_signoff impact_assessment_production_change)
(publish_change_decision impact_assessment_production_change external_reference_guidance_doc sme_engineering_1)
(propagate_assessor_assignment_to_assessment impact_assessment_production_change assessor_candidate_3 external_reference_guidance_doc)
(release_sme_from_request impact_assessment_production_change sme_engineering_1)
(engage_sme_for_request technical_owner_site_a sme_engineering_1)
(publish_change_decision technical_owner_site_a external_reference_guidance_doc sme_engineering_1)
(propagate_assessor_assignment_to_technical_owner technical_owner_site_a assessor_candidate_1 external_reference_guidance_doc)
(release_sme_from_request technical_owner_site_a sme_engineering_1)
(engage_sme_for_request process_owner_site_a sme_engineering_1)
(publish_change_decision process_owner_site_a external_reference_guidance_doc sme_engineering_1)
(propagate_assessor_assignment_to_process_owner process_owner_site_a assessor_candidate_2 external_reference_guidance_doc)
```
message.reasoning:
The problem is a planning problem in PDDL for pharmaceutics change control impact assessment. I need to output only the executable plan as a sequence of ground PDDL actions, one per line, in the format (action-name arg1 arg2 ...).


## Examining the Planning Problem  
- The task involves creating a plan for pharmaceutics change control impact assessment using PDDL.  
- The output must be an executable sequence of ground PDDL actions, each on a new line, in the format (action-name arg1 arg2 ...).

## Examining the Planning Problem  
- The task involves creating a plan for pharmaceutics change control impact assessment using PDDL.  
- The output must be an executable sequence of ground PDDL actions, each on a new line, in the format (action-name arg1 arg2 ...).  
- The plan aims to close four change control requests: technical_owner_site_a, process_owner_site_a, impact_assessment_equipment_change, and impact_assessment_production_change.  
- These requests are subtypes of change_control_request, with technical_owner and process_owner under owner_role_category, and impact_assessment under process_scope.  

## Analyzing Action Dependencies  
- To close requests, actions like propagate_assessor_assignment_to_technical_owner require entity_final_decision_recorded, assigned_assessor, entity_links_external_reference, and not change_closed.  
- publish_change_decision sets entity_final_decision_recorded and links external references, but requires ready_for_finalization, assigned_sme, and external_reference_available.  
- propagate_assessor_assignment sets change_closed, making assessor and external reference available for reuse.  

## Determining Readiness Conditions  
- Ready_for_finalization is needed for each request and can be achieved through various actions.  
- For technical_owner, close_technical_owner_conditions requires technical_owner_review_completed, technical_owner_analysis_complete, change_dossier_registered, and change_dossier_evidence_reviewed.  
- For impact_assessment, options include record_assessment_final_signoff (if assessment_technical_evaluation_completed), finalize_assessment_after_checks (if technical_eval_completed and checks_completed), or finalize_assessment_after_justification (if justification_approved).

## Identifying Impact Areas  
- To process technical_owner_site_a, identify_technical_impact_area requires ready_for_assessment, assigned_sme, and impacts, setting the identified status.  
- For process_owner_site_a, identify_quality_impact_area follows a similar flow, also requiring ready_for_assessment, assigned_sme, and impacts to set identified.  

## Assigning and Recording Reviews  
- Assign a functional reviewer using assign_functional_reviewer_to_request, requiring ready_for_assessment and fr_available, for technical_owner_site_a with functional_reviewer_quality_lead.  
- Record reviews with record_technical_owner_review, needing ready_for_assessment, assigned_fr, impacts, and identified, setting both review_completed and analysis_complete for technical_owner_site_a.  

## Assembling Change Dossier  
- Assemble the dossier with assemble_change_dossier, requiring review_completed, analysis_complete, impacts, and identified for both technical_owner and process_owner, setting dossier_registered and linking areas.  
- Mark evidence reviewed using mark_change_dossier_evidence_reviewed, needing registered dossier, review_completed, and assigned_sme, assuming sme_engineering_1 remains assigned for technical_owner_site_a.  

## Finalizing Conditions  
- Close technical_owner conditions with close_technical_owner_conditions, requiring review_completed, analysis_complete, registered dossier, and evidence_reviewed, setting ready_for_finalization for technical_owner_site_a.  
- Similarly, close_process_owner_conditions for process_owner_site_a follows the same prerequisites, setting ready_for_finalization.  

## Preparing Impact Assessments  
- Impact assessments like impact_assessment_equipment_change need to be processed, starting with record_change_request.  
- This involves assigning an assessor and engaging an sme to get ready_for_assessment, continuing the workflow.

## Managing Evidence and Associations  
- Each impact assessment (IA) has its own evidence, like evidence_test_report_1 for equipment and evidence_test_report_2 for production, attached via finalize_evidence.  
- Both IAs associate with the same dossier, ensuring assessment_associated_with_dossier holds for both, maintaining dossier consistency.  

## Handling Role Requirements  
- Technical_owner and process_owner roles need ready_for_assessment, along with assigned assessor and SME, following the change_request flow.  
- Identify_technical_impact_area requires ready_for_assessment for the technical_owner, ensuring alignment with workflow prerequisites.  

## Publishing Decisions  
- Publishing change decisions, like publish_change_decision for technical_owner_site_a, requires ready_for_finalization and assigned_sme, set after close_technical_owner_conditions.  
- After publishing, propagate_assessor_assignment_to_technical_owner sets closed status, making assessor and external reference available for reuse.  

## Sequencing Due to Shared Resources  
- Processing two IAs and roles like technical_owner and process_owner needs sequencing due to shared resources like SME, FR, and VP, which are releasable at the end.  
- The workflow suggests handling technical_owner first, then releasing SME to process process_owner, ensuring resource availability.

## Sequencing Workflow Steps  
- Process technical_owner_site_a first by recording the change request, assigning assessor_candidate_1, and engaging sme_engineering_1, leading to ready_for_finalization.  
- After finalizing, assign functional_reviewer_quality_lead, record the review, and ensure review_completed and analysis_complete are set.  

## Managing Assessor Availability  
- To free assessor_candidate_1, publish the decision for technical_owner_site_a, requiring assigned_sme and external reference, then propagate to close and release the assessor.  
- Use the freed assessor_candidate_1 for the next task, ensuring efficient resource reuse given only three assessors for four change_requests.  

## Handling Process Owner Workflow  
- For process_owner_site_a, record the change request, assign assessor_candidate_2, and ensure sme_engineering_1 is available by releasing it from technical_owner_site_a.  
- Engage sme_engineering_1, finalize, assign functional_reviewer_quality_lead, and record the review to achieve analysis_complete.

## Releasing Shared Resources  
- To process impact_assessment_production_change (ia2), release functional_reviewer_quality_lead and validation_protocol_pqi from impact_assessment_equipment_change (ia1).  
- Unassign technical_assessment_report_1 from ia1, making resources like SME and VP available for ia2.  

## Assigning Resources to IA2  
- Assign functional_reviewer_quality_lead, validation_protocol_pqi, and technical_assessment_report_1 to ia2 for further processing.  
- Finalize evidence and activate assessment for validation, ensuring ia2 reaches ready_for_finalization.  

## Closing Impact Assessments  
- Publish and propagate decisions for ia2, freeing assessor_candidate_3 and external reference for reuse.  
- Both ia1 and ia2 are now closed, completing the assessment phase.  

## Finalizing Technical Owner Workflow  
- Re-engage sme_engineering_1 for technical_owner_site_a after ensuring availability, then publish and propagate decisions.  
- This frees assessor_candidate_1 and external reference, aligning with ready_for_finalization status.  

## Finalizing Process Owner Workflow  
- Release sme_engineering_1 from technical_owner_site_a and re-engage for process_owner_site_a to continue.  
- Publish decisions to complete, ensuring all resources are managed efficiently.

## Releasing Resources from IA1  
- Release functional_reviewer_quality_lead and validation_protocol_pqi from impact_assessment_equipment_change to free resources.  
- Unassign technical_assessment_report_1 from ia1, making them available for other assessments.  

## Assigning Resources to IA2  
- Assign functional_reviewer_quality_lead, validation_protocol_pqi, and technical_assessment_report_1 to impact_assessment_production_change for processing.  
- Finalize evidence and activate assessment for validation, ensuring ia2 progresses.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
